_comment: Per-event audio config. `voice` is passed to macOS `say -v` — run `say -v '?'` to list voices available on your system. `phrase` is a jq expression evaluated against the hook's JSON payload; return an empty string to silence that event. `debounce_s` is a sliding-window debounce in seconds (0 disables). Default uses Samantha, which ships built-in on every Mac. Replace with whichever voices you prefer.

Notification.phrase: if ((.message // "") | startswith("Claude needs your permission")) then "" else "Notification in " + ((.cwd // "")|split("/")|last) + " - " + ((.message // "ready")[:50]) end
